title: Budgeting across boards
excerpt: Would love the ability to budget across boards and be seen on a dashboard. We have available funds and would like to see what we are left with after expenses are applied.  Thank you!

posts.author: angelaaccardi (Angela DeVirgilio)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love the ability to budget across boards and be seen on a dashboard. We have available funds and would like to see what we are left with after expenses are applied. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Angela,

Is this specific to a budgeting use-case? You’re essentially interested in managing finances within your account and reporting on this information via a dashboard? If this is the case, can I ask if you had come across our support resources specific to this usecase? You can check it out here → Manage your budget with monday.com
